results.seo_title: Meta Supervision Tools Give Parents Insights into Their Teen's…
results.meta_description: New supervision tools from Meta provide parents with insights into their teen's algorithm on Instagram and more.
results.body_html:
Parents can now view the general topics their teens engage with using Meta's supervision tools.

Viewing Algorithm Topics

  • Parents and guardians can access this feature in Family Center on Instagram, Facebook, and Messenger.
  • The tool provides a clearer understanding of the content their teens see on Instagram.
  • By expanding these insights to cover all available categories within Your Algorithm, families have a broader view of what their teens are engaging with.

Customizing Algorithm Settings

SettingDescription
Topic filtersParents can choose to see or hide specific topics in their teen's algorithm.
Content preferencesParents can select content types, such as photos, videos, or stories, to display in their teen's feed.

Notifications for Algorithm Changes

Soon, parents will receive notifications when their teen adds a new interest to their algorithm, helping explain why their content may change over time.

For example, if a teen adds an interest like basketball, photography, or musicals, their algorithm may adjust accordingly. Supervision gives parents broader visibility into those changes.

This update builds on existing protections like Teen Accounts on Instagram, Facebook, and Messenger, which include automatic privacy settings, limits on who can contact teens, and tools to help manage the content they see.

source.title: New Supervision Tools Give Parents Insights Into Their Teen’s Algorithm and More
source.summary:
We’re making it easier for parents to manage and supervise their teen’s experiences across our apps.

The post New Supervision Tools Give Parents Insights Into Their Teen’s Algorithm and More appeared first on Meta Newsroom.

results.seo_title: Meta Introduces Completely Private Way to Chat With AI
results.meta_description: Learn about Meta's Incognito Chat feature that allows private conversations with AI, and explore its benefits and limitations.
results.body_html:
Direct answer: Meta has introduced a completely private way to chat with AI, allowing users to have invisible conversations.

How Incognito Chat Works

  • Incognito Chat uses end-to-end encryption to ensure that only the user and Meta AI can access the conversation.
  • The feature is available on WhatsApp and other messaging platforms.
  • Users can switch between private and public modes at will.

Benefits of Incognito Chat

FeatureDescription
End-to-end encryptionEnsures that only the user and Meta AI can access the conversation.
Private modeAllows users to have invisible conversations.
Switchable modesUsers can switch between private and public modes at will.

Limitations of Incognito Chat

While Incognito Chat offers several benefits, it also has some limitations. For example:

Incognito Chat is only available on WhatsApp and other messaging platforms.

source.title: Introducing a Completely Private Way to Chat With AI
source.summary:
Incognito Chat lets you talk to Meta AI in a way that is invisible to anyone else.

The post Introducing a Completely Private Way to Chat With AI appeared first on Meta Newsroom.

results.seo_title: Meta Introduces Instants: A New Way to Share Photos in the Moment
results.meta_description: Meta introduces Instants, a new way to share photos in the moment with your Close Friends or mutual followers with just a tap.
results.body_html:
Photos you share on Instants disappear after they’ve been viewed and can’t be viewed after 24 hours.

You can capture an instant by tapping the mini pile of photos at the bottom right corner of your Instagram inbox or by opening the Instants app. From there, snap a photo in real time — no uploads from your phone’s photo gallery. You can also add a caption to your photo, but can’t make any further edits to it.

Features to Make Sharing With Friends Simple

Archive Your shared instants are saved in a private archive that only you can see for up to one year.

Recap to Stories Compile instants from your archive into a recap and post it to Instagram Stories for your followers.

No screenshots Friends can’t screenshot or record instants you share.

Undo Accidentally sent an instant? Quickly take it back before friends see it by tapping the undo button.

Snooze Hold down the pile of instants in your inbox to snooze them for later.

source.title: Introducing Instants: A New Way to Share in the Moment
source.summary:
Share authentic moments as they’re happening with your Close Friends or mutual followers with just a tap.

The post Introducing Instants: A New Way to Share in the Moment appeared first on Meta Newsroom.

results.seo_title: Google AI Misdirects Users to Share Personal Contact Info
results.meta_description: A recent incident highlights the risks of Google's generative AI, which can misdirect users into sharing their personal contact information.
results.body_html:
Yes, Google's generative AI can misdirect users into sharing their personal contact information.

Google's generative AI uses natural language processing to generate responses to user queries. The AI may not always understand the context of the query or the intent behind it. This can lead to misdirection, where users are directed to share sensitive information.

Use a VPN To mask IP addresses and prevent tracking. Reduces the risk of being tracked by Google's AI.

Verify sources To ensure that information is coming from a trusted source. Avoids sharing sensitive information with unverified sources.

Risks and Consequences Sharing personal contact information can have serious consequences, including identity theft and financial loss.

According to a recent report, there have been several incidents of Google's generative AI misdirecting users into sharing their personal contact information. Conclusion The incident highlights the need for greater caution when using Google's generative AI and emphasizes the importance of verifying sources before sharing sensitive information.

source.title: AI chatbots are giving out people’s real phone numbers
source.summary: A Redditor recently wrote that he was “desperate for help”: for about a month, he said, his phone had been inundated by calls from “strangers” who were “looking for a lawyer, a product designer, a locksmith.” Callers were apparently misdirected by Google’s generative AI.  In March, a software developer in Israel was contacted on WhatsApp…

results.seo_title: India's E-commerce Landscape Shifted by AI-Powered Trends
results.meta_description: India's e-commerce landscape is undergoing a fundamental shift driven by advances in AI, video-first discovery, and conversational messaging.
results.body_html:
India's e-commerce landscape is undergoing a fundamental shift driven by advances in AI, video-first discovery, and conversational messaging.

Key Trends Reshaping India's E-Commerce

AI-powered discovery and video-first commerce are transforming the shopping experience in India. The traditional search-and-transact model is giving way to a dynamic, scroll-led discovery ecosystem. Conversational messaging is driving transactions and changing the way people shop across the country.

Partnership Ads AI-powered creative tool for brands to create more effective campaigns.

GenAI-powered creative A tool that uses AI to generate creative content for brands.

Impact of AI on E-Commerce Jobs and Skills

The use of AI in e-commerce is creating new job opportunities in areas such as data analysis and marketing. Brands need to develop skills in AI-powered tools and platforms to stay competitive.

Conclusion India's e-commerce landscape is shifting towards a more dynamic and interactive shopping experience, driven by advances in AI, video-first discovery, and conversational messaging.

source.title: From Scroll to Chat to Cart: Trends Reshaping How India Shops
source.summary:
On the sidelines of the 2026 Meta Marketing Summit E-Commerce edition, we are sharing key trends shaping the future of shopping in India — from the rise of AI-powered discovery and video-first commerce to the growing role of conversational messaging in driving transactions.

The post From Scroll to Chat to Cart: Trends Reshaping How India Shops appeared first on Meta Newsroom.

results.body_html:

Non-consensual AI pornography created by altering existing photographs or videos using deepfake technology to modify the appearance of the participants. A form of revenge porn that involves the making and sharing of realistic videos featuring non-consenting individuals.

Consequences for Adult Content Creators

Threats to their rights and livelihoods due to the unauthorized use of their performances. Loss of control over their own content, leading to public humiliation or character assassination.

She wanted to see if the tech would pull up the porn videos she’d made more than 10 years before, when she was in her early 20s. It did in fact return…

results.seo_title: Gen Z's New Understanding of Truth: How Social Media is Shaping…
results.meta_description: Discover how social media is changing the way Gen Z understands truth, with a focus on mental health, identity, and emotional validation.
results.body_html:
Gen Z, the first generation to spend their earliest years in the smartphone era, has developed a fundamentally different relationship with truth.

Shifts in Mental Health

  • Sharp rise in adolescent anxiety, depression, loneliness, self-harm, and social withdrawal between 2010 and 2014.
  • Large-scale survey data from the United States, the United Kingdom, Canada, Australia, and Europe showed similar trend lines emerging during this period.

Cultural and Cognitive Transformation

As social life migrated onto platforms optimized for engagement, visibility, and emotional reaction, questions of truth increasingly became filtered through identity, emotion, and social validation rather than through slower institutional systems of evidence, authority, and debate.

Studies using data from the Centers for Disease Control and Prevention's long-running Youth Risk Behavior Survey found steep increases among teenage girls in depressive symptoms, sleep disruption, and feelings of persistent sadness and hopelessness.

Impact on Reality Processing

The shift from shared public truth toward personalized reality has significant implications for how Gen Z processes information and forms opinions.

Key Findings
Dramatic increases in time spent interacting online, alongside declines in face-to-face social interaction.
Changes in how young people consume and process information, with a focus on emotional reaction and social validation.

source.title: Gen Z Is Pioneering a New Understanding of Truth
source.summary: The first generation to truly grow up online, Generation Z and their cohort live in a social media ecosystem that blends facts and feelings. It’s significantly shifting how they understand what’s true.

results.seo_title: Reachy Mini goes fully local with Hugging Face's speech-to-speech…
results.meta_description: Reachy Mini now runs on a fully local speech-to-speech pipeline, eliminating the need for cloud services or API keys.
results.body_html:
Reachy Mini now runs on a fully local speech-to-speech pipeline, eliminating the need for cloud services or API keys.

Install Hugging Face's llama.cpp using brew install llama.cpp or winget install llama.cpp Run the following command to start the server: llama-server -hf ggml-org/gemma-4-E4B-it-GGUF -np 2 -c 65536 -fa on --swa-full

llama-server -hf ggml-org/gemma-4-E4B-it-GGUF Pulls the model straight from the Hub and downloads it for the first time.

llama-server -np 2 -c 65536 -fa on --swa-full Runs the server with two parallel slots and a cache size of 65536.

Benefits Our cascaded VAD → STT → LLM → TTS pipeline exposes a Realtime API-compatible /v1/realtime WebSocket, allowing for fast and flexible deployment of the speech backend.

source.title: Reachy Mini goes fully local

results.seo_title: Shipping a Trillion Parameters With a Hub Bucket: Delta Weight Sync…
results.meta_description: Async RL has reduced its per-step payload from 1.2 GB to 20-35 MB by using delta weight sync, a technique that encodes changed elements as a sparse…
results.body_html:
The per-step payload of async RL has been reduced from 1.2 GB to 20-35 MB using delta weight sync.

What is the One Terabyte Problem?The inference engine speaks the policy of step N, while the trainer just finished step N+1.The fresh weights have to get from one side to the other before the inference engine starts drifting.This problem has been a challenge for async RL libraries.How Does Delta Weight Sync Work?Between two consecutive RL optimizer steps, roughly 99% of bf16 weights are bit-identical (and never less than 98% in the worst case).Benefits of Delta Weight SyncBenefitDescriptionReduced per-step payloadThe payload has been reduced from 1.2 GB to 20-35 MB.Improved efficiencyAsync

source.title: Shipping a Trillion Parameters With a Hub Bucket: Delta Weight Sync in TRL

results.seo_title: Establishing AI and Data Sovereignty in Autonomous Systems
results.meta_description: Learn how data sovereignty is becoming a key factor in enterprise AI success and forging safe agentic systems.
results.body_html:
When generative AI first moved from research labs into real-world business applications, enterprises made a tacit bargain: “Capability now, control later.” Feed your proprietary data into third-party AI models, and you will get powerful results. But your data passes through systems you do not own, under governance you do not set.

Key Challenges in Data SovereigntyLoss of control over proprietary dataUncertainty around data governanceRisk of data breaches and unauthorized accessBenefits of Data Sovereignty for Enterprise AI SuccessBenefitDescriptionData ownership and controlAbility to make informed decisions about data usage and sharingImproved data qualityReduced risk of data breaches and unauthorized accessEnhanced AI model performanceBetter alignment with business goals and objectivesForging Safe Agentic Systems through Data Sovereignty“Sovereignty over data and models is becoming a defining factor in enterprise AI success, as well as a prerequisite for forging safe agentic systems.”

results.seo_title: YouTube starts automatically labeling AI-generated content on its…
results.meta_description: YouTube is now taking AI labeling seriously by relocating disclosures and automatically identifying AI-generated content.
results.body_html:
YouTube will now automatically label AI-generated content on its platform, making it easier for viewers to spot.

AI disclosures will be relocated to the main stage of videos, making them more visible to viewers. The new label format will apply to all photorealistic and meaningfully AI altered or generated content on YouTube. YouTube is rolling out new internal signals to automatically identify and label AI-generated videos.

AI Label The new label will appear directly below the video player, above the description.

Shorts Overlay The AI label will also appear as an overlay on YouTube Shorts.

Viewers get the context they need at a glance, with the new label format making it easier to spot AI-generated content. Creators must still manually disclose when using photorealistic AI, but the new system will help identify and label more AI content.

Next Steps YouTube says it's committed to establishing a system that the platform actually sticks with, after inconsistent labeling practices in the past.

source.title: YouTube is putting AI labels where you’ll actually see them
source.summary: YouTube is making changes to its AI labeling policy, moving AI disclosures from less visible locations to more prominent spots on Shorts and long-form videos. The platform will also begin automatically identifying and labeling AI-generated content. This move aims to increase transparency about AI use on the site.

results.body_html:
China is increasingly keeping its best AI talent to itself, with Beijing reluctant to let them go elsewhere.

Key Factors Behind China's Talent Retention

High salaries and benefits packages State-of-the-art research facilities and infrastructure Close ties between government and academia

Talent Flows and Global Implications

Talent Flow Destination Country Impact on Global Tech Industry

Brain drain to the US and EU US, EU Loss of expertise and innovation

Remittances from Chinese expats Global economy Foreign exchange earnings

Regulatory Environment and AI Safety Concerns China's strict regulations on data sharing and AI development pose a challenge to global collaboration and innovation.

Conclusion and Future Outlook The retention of China's best AI talent has significant implications for the global tech industry, highlighting the need for more collaborative and inclusive approaches to AI development.

source.title: China is increasingly keeping its best AI talent to itself
source.summary: China has seen a surge in its artificial intelligence (AI) capabilities, resulting in the development of highly skilled professionals in the field. As a result, the Chinese government is becoming more selective about allowing these experts to work abroad or join foreign companies. This trend suggests that Beijing is prioritizing the retention of its top AI talent within the country.

results.body_html:
Meta is rolling out paid subscription plans for Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp worldwide.

Key Features of Meta OneNew AI-focused offerings under the Meta One subscription brandPaid subscription plans for Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsAppCreator and business-focused featuresBenefits of Meta OneFeatureDescriptionNew AI-focused offeringsTesting new AI-powered features under the Meta One subscription brandPaid subscription plansRolling out paid plans for Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp worldwideCreator and business-focused featuresFeatures designed to support creators and businesses on the platformImpact of Meta OneMeta's new subscription service aims to provide users with more control over their online experience, while also generating revenue for the company.

source.title: Meta launches Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp subscriptions, with more to come, including AI plans
source.summary: Meta has launched paid subscription plans for Instagram, Facebook, and WhatsApp globally, offering users a range of features and benefits in exchange for a monthly fee. The company is also exploring additional subscription options, including AI-powered tools and creator-focused services, under the "Meta One" umbrella. These new offerings are part of Meta's broader strategy to provide more value to its users through premium subscriptions.

results.seo_title: UK Visa Portal Exposed Thousands of Applicants' Passports and Selfies
results.meta_description: The UK visa portal exposed thousands of applicants' passports and selfies, but instead of fixing the issue, it sent attorneys.
results.body_html:
The UK visa portal exposed thousands of applicants' passports and selfies, but instead of fixing the issue, it sent attorneys.

Thousands of Passports and Selfies Exposed

Over 10,000 passport numbers were leaked online. The location data of thousands of applicants was also exposed. Applicants' personal information was not secured.

May 27, 2026 The website sent attorneys to fix the issue.

Security Concerns "The security of our systems is our top priority," said a spokesperson for the UK government. "We are taking immediate action to address this incident."

The website has not yet fixed the leak. No timeline has been provided for when the issue will be resolved. Applicants who were affected are being contacted by the authorities.

source.title: UK Visa Portal exposed thousands of applicants’ passports and selfies — then called the lawyers on us
source.summary: A third-party website handling UK visa applications has been compromised, exposing sensitive information including passport numbers, selfies, and location data of thousands of applicants. The breach was not addressed by the website's administrators, who instead contacted lawyers to deal with the situation. This response has raised concerns about the company's handling of the security breach.
